creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Update to 5.0.9
- Trim Makefile header
- Trim master sites
- Change license BSD --> ZLIB BSD
- Remove versions from LIB_DEPENDS
- Trim dependency for textproc/hs-pandoc, ALSA
- New world order USES: cmake pkgconfig
- Remove conflict with allegro
- Set PORTSCOUT
- Add DOCS, ALSA, PULSEAUDIO and EXAMPLES Option
- Add docs, examples, fix conflict with allegro
- Use REINPLACE_CMD instead of simple patches
- Trim demos Cosmic Protector and SPEED, add Icons, Desktop entry files
- Trim Makefile.man
- Trim pkg-plist, remove docs and examples

Added file(s):
- files/pkg-message.in
- files/cosmic_protector.in
- files/speed.in

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
